title: YogLabs 2
description: The official modpack for used for the YogLabs 2 YouTube miniseries
body:
![YogLabs 2 Logo](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/6602e3868144b8486d855d7b/17ff0e42-81a4-49f8-9ecc-f3256a6058aa/yoglabs2logo.png)
**YogLabs 2** is a **1.20.1** Forge modpack featuring all the mods used to make the YogLabs 2 miniseries.

- Build your own laboratory with Blocks You Need, Artemis' Laboratory Blocks and MrCrayfish's Furniture. (Featured in [Episode 1: We're back, baby!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uv06bzr7Y3U))
- Bring realistic physics into the world of Minecraft with Valkyrien Skies. (Featured in [Episode 2: New Coffee Machine](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kMbPq67xX6c))
- Become a skateboarding champion with I Wanna Skate. (Featured in [Episode 3: Boney Hawk's Pro Skater](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KXYjesEend0))
- Fight for the future of your laboratory with Create Big Cannons and Create Radars. (Featured in [Episode 5: Full Metal Jacket Potato](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Yxd4i9h3dN8))
- Build your own vehicles and take to the roads, skies and seas with Create Clockwork. (Featured in [Episode 6: Saving Private Simon](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kMbPq67xX6c))

_Please note this modpack was designed with creative building in mind and was not intended to be used for survival playthroughs._

Be sure to also check out [Reign of Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts) which featured in [Episode 4: Real Time Simon](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KrvfJiWGcak) but has been left out of this modpack as it completely transforms the game.
